title: LMod
description: LMod is a general content mod that adds features such as guns, a seed pouch, and an Exp Chest!
body:
![LMod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bae84777b5298f1c822acf388f73edd9e15423.png)
# LMod
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LMod (or LinkMod) is my main personal modding project (with help from my friend Sooigee). LMod doesnt have a central theme or concept it is based around. Instead, LMod is where I put features that I think "wouldn't it be cool if minecraft had this". Currently Lmod adds features such as:

# Guns!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
While there are a lot of differences between each of the guns, there are currently 3 main types:

* Rifle-Types
  
  There are many rifle-type weapons, ranging from the humble boiler pistol, to the autorifle. Each serves its own purpose, but they all share the same ammunition, with types such as Hollow point, Ratshot, and Gyrojet.

* Shotguns
  
  There are 2 shotgun types, Double Barrel, and Pump Action, that can use ammunition such as blazeshot to ignite foes, slimeshot which bounces off of surfaces, or breezeshot which sends the user flying!

* Grenade Launcher

  While there is only one grenade launcher, the variety comes from its ammo types. With rounds such as Demolition Grenades, Incendiary Grenades, and Shape Grenades, you can choose from many options.

* Important Notes 

Guns can be loaded and unloaded just like bundles.
Certain guns have a bloom mechanic, causing them to lose accuracy with rapid use.
All guns and gun-related items can be crafted with use of the lathe, LMod's new workstation.

# Exp Chest!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The Experience Chest (or Exp Chest for short) is a storage block that functions similarly to the Ender Chest. It stores Exp points numerically, per player, and globally.

# Various Items!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* Seed Bag
  
  The Seed Bag is a farming tool used to store and plant large amounts of seeds quickly. Once you have put seed in your seed bag, just right click to release up to 8 seeds at once. Seeds automatically root onto nearby farmland once they land.

* Throwing Kunai

  The Kunai works in both melee and ranged combat, and you can hold up to 16 in any slot.

* Stick of TNT

  The Stick of TNT can be thrown as a simpler and longer ranged alternative to standart tnt. You can hold it in your hand to let the fuse burn partially before throwing it, but if you hold it for too long it will explode in your hand.

* Mask of Obscurity

  The Mask of Obscurity is only really useful in multiplayer scenarios. It completely hides your nametag, and takes you off of the locator bar. It's great for sneaking around and hide and seek games.

# Blocks!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LMod also adds some building blocks! Currently the mod adds 2 new sandstone blocks ( embossed sandstone and gilded sandstone), as well as blocks a new shiny red stone blockset called hematite. embossed sandstone can be crafted at a stonecutter, and gilded sandstone can be crafted with embossed sandstone and gold nuggets, and the hematite blocks can be crafted with iron nuggets and cobblestone.

# Pillagers!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3 new temperature-specific gun-wielding illagers have been added with a chance to spawn in raids:
* The Desperado
  
  The Desperado is a wild west style bandit who lives in hot biomes, uses revolvers, and likes to throw dynamite.
  
* The Stalker

  The Stalker is a ranger who lives in cold biomes, uses a sniper, and runs away if you get too close.

* The Extortioner

  The Extortioner lives in temperate biomes, and uses standard weapons. It is the most basic out of the new pillagers.
